## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.1

### 🔧 HACS Update Detection
- Publishes a fresh stable release after the 1.2.6.x release cleanup so HACS can discover the current update from a clean release list.
- Keeps the manifest version aligned with the latest release at `1.3.1`.
- Adds the integration issue tracker metadata expected by HACS/Home Assistant integration manifests.

### 📦 Release Metadata
- Keeps `v1.3.1` as a normal stable GitHub release, not a prerelease.
- Leaves the 1.3.0 camera live view, AI notification, blueprint, and documentation changes unchanged.
